'''''Star's Delight''''' was a [[Gymsnor-3 light freighter/Legends|Gymsnor-3 light freighter]] owned by the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] weapon trader [[Lai Nootka]]. In addition to Nootka, the crew comprised the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Saricia]] and a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Star's Delight pilot|pilot]]. In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], the crew were captured by [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Mosh Barris/Legends|Mosh Barris]] for attempting to sell [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] spare parts and [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]], keeping the ''Star's Delight'' grounded on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]]. With some help by [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], Nootka and his crew eventually [[Great Evacuation|escaped]] from Garqi.
